chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2103 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.10319/2025. 2. For orders on CMA No.10320/2025. 3. For orders on CMA No.10321/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 22.05.2025 Syed Aminuddin Fakir, advocate for the petitioner. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. 1. Urgency granted. 2. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 3&4. Through this Petition, the Petitioner has challenged the vires of Section 8 of the Finance Act, 2022 whereby, Capital Value Tax has been levied on moveable and immovable assets of the tax payers. The said controversy already stands decided by this Court vide Judgment dated 30.12.2022 passed in CP D 4942 of 2022 and other connected matters, whereby, the Petitions have been dismissed. Learned Assistant Attorney General waives notice and it is jointly sought that the petition may also be dismissed in terms as above Accordingly, this Petition is dismissed for the reasons so assigned in the aforesaid Judgment dated 30.12.2022 passed in CP D 4942 of 2022 and other connected matters. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
